name: rolepod-mcp
description: Multi-platform UI/mobile automation for AI agents — 4 shipped skills (verify-ui, audit-a11y, visual-diff, scaffold-e2e) + MCP server with 15 tools. v0.3 adds AppiumEngine scaffolding for iOS/Android; web is production-ready via Playwright.

interface.shortDescription: UI verification, a11y audits, visual diff, e2e scaffolding — for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: rolepod-mcp ships an MCP server with 15 tools (10 atomic + 5 composite) and 4 user-invocable skills (/verify-ui, /audit-a11y, /visual-diff, /scaffold-e2e). Web is fully supported via Playwright; mobile (iOS/Android via Appium) lands in v0.3.
defaultPrompt: Use /verify-ui to drive a real browser through the change I just made and prove it works.
Use /audit-a11y to scan the page for WCAG-AA issues.
Use /scaffold-e2e to convert this verify run into a runnable Playwright test.
